ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-06-2019 Continued To Sep-10-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Natalie Lupo for Petitioner/Personal Representative.

Ms. Lupo stated that they are going to amend the petition, that they are waiting for the heir finder to provide a full report, that the real property was sold, that they need to calculate that in with the distribution, and requested a 30-day continuance to file and serve the amended petition. The First and Final Report on Waiver of Account, etc. is continued to September 10, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel is to make sure the amended petition addresses all of the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes with respect to the pending petition. The amended petition is to be filed by September 3, 2019.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: B. Wan. Not reported.

Petition By Administrator To Establish Estates Claim Of Ownership To Property And For Order Directing Its Transfer To The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-15-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Lachona for petitioner Ed Lockett.

Mr. Lachona reported that he had spoken with two potential beneficiaries of the unsignes 2011 trust, and had been told they were unaware of the 2013 trust. He said that no one objected to the relief sought by the petition. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. (Not reported)

Petition By Administrator To Establish Estates Claim Of Ownership To Property And For Order Directing Its Transfer To The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-28-2017 Continued To Aug-09-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kevin Lachona for Ed Lockett.

Mr. Lachona stated that he does not have a copy of the phantom trust, that he contacted the drafting Attorney, and that the Attorney's recollection is that the beneficiaries are one or two neighbors and a small portion to a charity. Mr. Lachona also stated that it is not an executed trust, that is was not signed and that there is no basis to provide notice to the beneficiaries. In addition, Mr. Lachona stated that the initial amount of $300,000.00 came from the drafting Attorney, that property taxes have not been paid for about five years, that there is a credit union account with around $15,000.00 and that the real property is the bulk of the estate so far. The Petition to Establish Estates Claim of Ownership to Property, etc. is continued to August 9, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-18-2017 Granted Per Written Order
